posts.text:
“The line between silicon and carbon has always been an illusion.”

As much as as this conversation below is about Ai.  We are able to converge biologically as we build robots that will blow our minds. 

Crafted with nanomaterials, they will profoundly shape us and our thoughts in a feedback loop.  Were we begin to wonder who’s in charge.  

Then we finally realize we never were.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
